channel.title: +Free man on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Free man on Vishvas's notes

item.title: gangAdhara's route
item.description: Background My and Ramya’s parents come from a background where monthly salary was the only source of income and was sufficient to take care of food, shelter and education. Travel was limited to summer vacation to grandparents home. But that life was very enjoyable. Lots of family time was the foundation stone. Transition When we both started earning. We were clearly products of an education that focussed of employability. So I was in corporate for 17+ years, Ramya worked as a teacher for 10+ yrs.

item.title: Quit selling time for money
item.description: The calculation You can quit selling your time and toil for money and dedicate yourself to doing exactly what you want: If you are able to figure out a situation where you (and your dependents) can today live with an adequate quality of life for 500$ per month (= 33000₹ in 2016) [this is just an example – plug in any number you like], if you (and dependents) expect to live x years, if you have accumulated sufficient wealth, That is - 500*12x = 6000x dollars (eg.

item.title: Work
item.description: Work for free, make money from leisure - GuruAnaerobic.
